reviews.author: kaycie clymer
reviews.text: great local dive. there was a $10 cover to see a grateful dead cover band. it was a bit crowded, yet the crowd was kind and we had a great experience! looks like they host karaoke night and open mic night weekly.

reviews.author: Daniel Sakol
reviews.text: I don’t write reviews often. This place is a diamond in the rough. The staff are equally personable AND professional. In some respects, it feels like a dive bar. But the conversations and the vibes are unmatched. If you’re in the area, this is the place blows every other bar/venue out of the water. Definitely worth exploring and enjoying!!

reviews.author: lmt6600
reviews.text: No food here just drinks but you can bring outside food. Good atmosphere, friendly staff, friendly people, typical neighbour bar. Open mic on Monday nights, one guy was actually very good singer and player.

reviews.author: Bee Traveling
reviews.text: Sometimes, A bar is just a bar, but this place definitely books some awesome bands while still managing to keep the drinks reasonably priced, and has some decent food. I was only there for the music and didn't take pictures of the food but will definitely be back to rip through the menu and re review it accordingly. The price for admission for bands are a little high, but it is a smaller venue, and i know they have to pay the bands and such but $20 to see a cover band is a little crazy. I'll definitely be back but will only be blowing my money on food and drinks than the music. Cheers

reviews.author: Linley Thompson
reviews.text: Whoa, holy McHenry! Excellent venue, highly recommend!

reviews.author: JD
reviews.text: Good bar good bartenders. The owner is friendly. They also serve frozen pizzas so there is a bonus for food. Who doesn't want food after some drinks ? Classic dive bar & they also have slots & darts. Great place. I love coming here with my friends. Every time I always have fun. I highly recommend this bar!

reviews.author: Mackenzie Gast
reviews.text: I love coming here with my buddy Ayden for karaoke! It’s always a very welcoming and fun vibe from the staff and regulars. The live music is great too! They have a lot of people come in with original music which is always a nice change up. They have a great selection of craft beer and have fun non-alcoholic bevs as well!

reviews.author: Kent Lewis
reviews.text: Great place to catch a pizza a ball game or see some awesome live music

reviews.author: R Scott Sables
reviews.text: Great vibe ! Enjoyed the show with great acoustics and lighting. The service was super friendly and welcoming. Top favorite dive bar of all times with nice quaint venue Owners are super cool with Lee, Jake and others as awsome servers.

reviews.author: Anthony Cruz
reviews.text: Great live music venue

reviews.author: Tanner Fehring
reviews.text: This place is the ultimate dive bar. It's an old school type place but it definitely can hold some cool parties especially with the bands that come through. Some good music is here.. and they give free stickers! Amazing!

reviews.author: Harriet Wary
reviews.text: Classiest dive bar around. With a awesome bourbon and whiskey selection. Amazing beer selection with well over 100 craft beers to chose from. Great live music 4 to 6 nights a week. Fun crowd and staff with a laid back loving atmosphere. Don't judge a book by its cover, this bar is truely a diamond in the rough.

reviews.author: Mhari G.
reviews.text: This hideout is hiding an incredible selection of drinks and at good prices

reviews.author: Rik Welter
reviews.text: The crowd is as friendly and lovable as the staff. Large craft beer selection. The whiskey selection is limited, but has a lot of tasty whiskeys to offer above and beyond the Jack/Jim/Jameson level. Every band I've ever seen here has been amazing, from bluegrass to funk to blues...It's always a fun time!

reviews.author: Bubba Frank
reviews.text: Great spot for music and libations. We went on a Saturday, it was a full house and they had 5-6 local acts playing all night. Love to see places support the local music scene and this place seems to have created quite the following doing so. Great job!

reviews.author: Kenn Kirby
reviews.text: Mackey's always provides an exceptional music and a wide selection of beer and ale. The people are friendly and the atmosphere makes you feel welcome.

reviews.author: Allison
reviews.text: Fun little spot filled with great music and musicians for Open Mic. The staff was friendly and responsive while the drinks were cold! Sean hosted a great night of music. He is phenomenal!

reviews.author: Jason Evans
reviews.text: This is the greatest dive bar ever. The beer selection is phenomenal and Mackey is always getting stuff on tap that you can't find anywhere else. They've usually got good live music, check it out!

reviews.author: Ryan Filip
reviews.text: Hideaway is the perfect description for this place!! It's complete with a hidden parking lot and away in the country where you're even less likely to be spotted. Craft beer menu is solid and they change it up often but they also have domestic beers at good prices.

reviews.author: THOMAS GARCIA
reviews.text: Awesome pizza and appetizers! Bartenders are on top of it! Classic dive bar, can't wait to go back!

reviews.author: Van 2
reviews.text: We went to see Alabaster , great local band , nice crowd and staff.

reviews.author: Phill Provance
reviews.text: I probably haven't been in another more quintessential road house in my life. More Bang! Bang! Bar from Twin Peaks than simple Beer-and-Shot joint, it somehow treads that fine line between hipster speakeasy and mainstay watering hole. Just, definitely go with your GPS on or you might miss it.

reviews.author: Jason Jockomo Cares
reviews.text: Shhh, don't tell anyone you've found the hottest ticket in the County and beyond! This gem has all the facets that makes for the best of times anywhere. You will not find a better place with better music in the county and then some! How this place became the hot spot for the best in music is beyond me but someone here seriously knows who's who and what's hotter than Hades. And with that incredible beer selection to happily wet anyone's whistle, a great mix of top shelf spirits and the staff that will add smiles on top of your smiles too plus great pizza as well!! But then you know that because you have found The HIDEOUT ...Shhh. I should note, a couple years ago my Son had dropped his wallet with more than a few hundred dollars in it. It was found and returned with all the cash. This not only speaks well of Bill and his people but of his customer's too!!

reviews.author: Phrank Isthename
reviews.text: My favorite little concert venue in the area and the drinks are affordable. Pizza is pretty damn good. Always a good time.

reviews.author: Massive Anxiety Publishing
reviews.text: Personal bonfires, world class bluegrass and jam bands, and a mini-festival grounds atmosphere, sanitizer stations, and a curated microbrew selection—Mackey’s is one of a kind, folks. Bands, brews, the outdoors, socially distant good times. Dress warmly, bring a chair, and have a night out that you you are not going to find anywhere else. Friendly staff, ample parking. Just go. Check the music schedule and go, people. Mackey’s is a music institution.

reviews.author: Kenn Pappas
reviews.text: Mackey's Hideout is always a welcome experience. It's the place to go to watch a baseball game, chat with friends, friendly strangers, the owner, and listen to music as musicians stroll in to demonstrate their talent on their various instruments. And if you have a favorite brew, they've got it, which makes your visit to Mackey's Hideout well worth your time.

reviews.author: Skye Braakman
reviews.text: Been going here for 8 years now! Been less often that I've been stopping by but when I can make it in, I still feel at home! Live music, patio and great live music!

reviews.author: Giuseppe Veneziano
reviews.text: Here for karaoke. Great location and service. Didn't eat this time.

reviews.author: Colleen Ross
reviews.text: Had a great time! Good band & the bartenders were very attentive with quick service.

reviews.author: John R (p play)
reviews.text: Best hippie bar in McHenry Country hands down. Great live music almost every night and an aresonal of dank beer options.
